summary: Audit/Eval export is complete for local-only V1 and has started Hermes Professional Phase 2 hardening. Local review comments produce persisted review-derived eval cases, audit package and durable eval exports are exposed through approval-gated local API routes, and each export writes a local JSON file, SQLite export metadata, source-index manifest, export hash, and audit event. The AgentOps ExportPackage now carries read-only persisted gate evidence IDs and eval snapshot provenance for source runs, reviews, gates, checkpoints, evidence, claims, audit events, feedback exports, candidate skills, and approved playbooks.
contractsChanged: buildAgentRunAuditEvents AgentRun to AuditEvent export mapping
buildToolCallAuditEvents ToolCallLog to AuditEvent export mapping
buildReviewCommentAuditEvents ReviewComment to AuditEvent export mapping
buildGateResultAuditEvents GateResult to AuditEvent export mapping
ExportPackage tamper-detection test coverage for package_hash and manifest_counts
Matter-scoped Command Center can render adapter-backed ExportPackage summary from buildExportPackage

Remote matter audit_pack content now includes matterProfile, documentList, evidenceMatrix, issueMap, riskRegister, draftMemo, finalMemo, reviewComments, gateResults, agentRunTrace, toolCallLog, humanApprovalLog, auditEvents, evalCases, workProducts, and exportHash
Remote feedback_export content now includes canonical eval failure types and derived evalCases
Local review-derived eval case persistence schema aletheia-review-derived-eval-local-v0
Review resolution to eval case path for missing_citation and wrong_risk_level
Local audit export package schema aletheia-local-export-package-v1

risks: ExportPackage is a local/view-layer schema and must remain behind persisted approval gates for high-risk audit and feedback exports.
Persisted gate evidence in AgentOps ExportPackage is read-only provenance. It preserves audit event and checkpoint IDs when supplied; it does not authorize final export by itself.
Eval snapshot provenance in AgentOps ExportPackage is read-only provenance. It is not a persisted learning signal, product quality claim, or skill approval.
Final export gate pass without gate_results_persisted, final_export_gate_authorized, and approval checkpoint provenance now remains visible as failed persisted_gate_evidence validation.
Remote export content is still generated from existing matter detail records; local backend routes now persist audit/eval export packages for local-only V1.
ToolCall audit events are export-scoped records anchored to their AgentRun because the shared ArtifactType vocabulary does not yet include a first-class tool_call artifact.
ReviewComment and GateResult audit events are export-scoped derived records; they do not replace first-class persisted backend audit rows.
Supabase review-derived eval and export persistence are explicitly unsupported in local-only V1.
needs: Next Phase 2 slices can start a narrow AnduAI parity workflow fixture for external-source workpapers or shareholder graph source edges.
Production/SaaS export parity remains outside the local-only V1 scope.
Installer and enterprise deployment packaging remain outside this lane.
